message:
feat: persist partition catalogs in DO storage + expose in explain()

- PartitionCatalog.serialize()/deserialize() for durable storage persistence
- Catalogs saved to ctx.storage on build, restored on DO wake (ensureInitialized)
- Survives DO hibernation — no rebuild needed across requests
- ExplainResult.partitionCatalog shows column + partition value count
- At PB scale: catalog persists across millions of queries without rebuild cost
